title: Anniversary Statement: Cessna 208B, G-CPSS
body: "This statement provides an update on the AAIB investigation into an accident involving a Cessna 208B at Cranfield Airport, Bedfordshire 23 March 2024.  In cruise the pilot noticed an abnormal smell and some smoke from the exhausts.  The low oil pressure light illuminated, and the pilot diverted to Cranfield Airport.  On shut down flames were noticed coming from the exhaust.  The investigation is ongoing and is focussing on potential factors related to the engine.  A final report will be published in due course. "
